content:
🌟 localsend | Dart
🎯 Primary Use Case: Securely and directly sharing files and messages between devices on the same local network without internet dependency.
✨ Key Features: • Open-source and free • Cross-platform (Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, iOS) • Secure file and message sharing • Local network transfer (no internet required) • REST API and HTTPS encryption
📖 Summary: LocalSend is a free, open-source, cross-platform application designed for secure file and message sharing between nearby devices over a local network. It operates without requiring an internet connection or relying on third-party servers, utilizing a REST API and HTTPS encryption for secure communication.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
